lines.english: Raag Maaroo, First Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਚਰਨ ਕੀ ਹੋਇ ਰਹਾ ਸਦ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saajan tere charan kee hoe rahaa sad dhoor |
lines.english: O my Friend, I shall forever remain the dust of Your feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਤੁਹਾਰੀਆ ਪੇਖਉ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak saran tuhaareea pekhau sadaa hajoor |1|
lines.english: Nanak seeks Your protection, and beholds You ever-present, here and now. ||1||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਸਦਿ ਮਿਲੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jinee teraa naam dhiaaeaa tin kau sad mile |1|
lines.english: You send out the call, Lord, to those who meditate on Your Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਮੇ ਛਤ੍ਰ ਸਰਾਇਚੇ ਦਿਸਨਿ ਰਥ ਪੀੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: kheme chhatr saraaeiche disan rath peerre |
lines.english: Tents, canopies, pavilions and carriages are prepared and made ready for them.
Shabad:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਛਹੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਦੜਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਲੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: pichhahu raatee sadarraa naam khasam kaa lehi |
lines.english: Those who receive the call in the last hours of the night, chant the Name of their Lord and Master.
Father, I am unfortunate, a fraud.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਧਾ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੂਲਾ ਮਨੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam na paaeaa teraa andhaa bharam bhoolaa man meraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have not found Your Name; my mind is blind and deluded by doubt. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਥੋੜੇ ਦੁਖ ਅਗਲੇ ਦੂਖੇ ਦੂਖਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sukh thorre dukh agale dookhe dookh vihaae |2|
lines.english: Now my joys are few, and my pains are many. In utter agony, I pass my life. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਦ ਕੀਤੇ ਦੁਖ ਪਰਫੁੜੇ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖੇ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saad keete dukh parafurre poorab likhe maae |
lines.english: I have enjoyed the tastes, and now my pains have come to fruition; such is my pre-ordained destiny, O my mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਵੀਛੁੜੈ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਮੇਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: vichhurriaa kaa kiaa veechhurrai miliaa kaa kiaa mel |
lines.english: What separation could be worse than separation from the Lord? For those who are united with Him, what other union can there be?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੋ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿਨਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਖੇਲੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saahib so saalaaheeai jin kar dekhiaa khel |3|
lines.english: Praise the Lord and Master, who, having created this play, beholds it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਜੋਗੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਭੀ ਸੰਜੋਗ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: vijogee mil vichhurre naanak bhee sanjog |4|1|
lines.english: Those who have lost their destiny, suffer separation from this union. O Nanak, they may still be united once again! ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਜੋਗੀ ਮੇਲਾਵੜਾ ਇਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਕੀਤੇ ਭੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: sanjogee melaavarraa in tan keete bhog |
lines.english: By good destiny, this union comes about; this body enjoys its pleasures.
The union of the mother and father brings the body into being.
Maaroo, First Mehl:
The Creator inscribes upon it the inscription of its destiny.
O foolish mind, why are you so proud?
According to this inscription, gifts, light and glorious greatness are received.
Joining with Maya, the spiritual consciousness is lost. ||1||
You shall have to arise and depart when it pleases your Lord and Master. ||1||Pause||
Abandon the tastes of the world, and find intuitive peace.
All must abandon their worldly homes; no one remains here forever.
He adorns his body and ress in silk robes.
Eat some, and save the rest,
if you are destined to return to the world again. ||2||
When he falls into the hands of the Messenger of Death, what good does it do to cry out? ||3||
Preparing his comfortable bed, he sleeps.
He issues all sorts of commands.
Household affairs are whirlpools of entanglements, O Siblings of Destiny.
